citation.description: PlanReviewGeneration dataclass marks relation_snapshot and ticket_store_revision with field(compare=False), so unrelated store changes do not affect equality

criteria.criterion: Signing SUCCEEDS when an UNRELATED ticket is committed to the tracker between review-start (initial_generation) and sign time, provided the subject's own material and its direct related material are unchanged.

citation.description: test_subject_material_change_still_aborts and test_related_material_change_still_aborts both assert PlanReviewGenerationChanged is raised

criteria.criterion: Signing still FAILS (PlanReviewGenerationChanged) when the SUBJECT's own material OR a direct child/prerequisite's material changed during the window.

citation.description: before/after tracker_head_sha fence retained in sign_manifest; before != after triggers a retry (not abort)

criteria.criterion: The within-attempt before/after head fence is preserved.

citation.description: test_unrelated_store_churn_does_not_abort_signing creates initial with store={'9999...':'open'} and fresh with store={'9999...':'closed'} (different revision), wires collect to return fresh, and asserts sign_manifest returns {signed:True}. Comment explicitly notes pre-fix behavior.

criteria.criterion: A test simulates an unrelated concurrent tracker write during the window and asserts a signature is persisted; the pre-fix code path would raise PlanReviewGenerationChanged.
